app.name: Rural Finance Hub Cambodia
app.tagline: Compare loans, find financial services, and learn about money — in your language.

home.hero_subtitle: Compare loans from ACLEDA, ABA, Wing and microfinance institutions, find services near you, and build your financial knowledge.
home.feature_loans_desc: Compare interest rates, terms, and monthly payments across banks and MFIs.
home.feature_finder_desc: Locate nearby bank branches, MFI offices, Wing and TrueMoney agents.
home.feature_education_desc: Learn about interest, savings, loans, and digital payments with simple guides.
home.feature_chatbot_desc: Ask questions anytime via our Telegram chatbot in Khmer or English.

loans.title: Loan Comparison Tool
loans.subtitle: Compare loan products from banks, MFIs, and digital wallets across Cambodia.
loans.no_results: No loan products match your filters. Try adjusting the amount or provider type.

finder.title: Financial Service Finder
finder.subtitle: Find banks, MFI offices, Wing and TrueMoney agents near you.
finder.no_results: No services found nearby. Try a different filter.
finder.location_denied: Location access denied. Showing all services.

education.title: Financial Education Center
education.subtitle: Learn the basics of personal finance — at your own pace.

interest_rates.title: Understanding Interest Rates
interest_rates.summary: Learn what interest rates mean and how they affect your loan repayments.

loan_risks.title: Loan Risks & Responsible Borrowing
loan_risks.summary: Understand the risks of borrowing and how to borrow responsibly.

savings.title: Building Healthy Savings Habits
savings.summary: Simple strategies to start and grow your savings, even with a small income.

digital_payments.title: Digital Payments & Mobile Money
digital_payments.summary: How to safely use Wing, TrueMoney, and other mobile money services.

chatbot.title: Telegram Chat Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: Ask about loans, nearby services, or financial tips — directly from Telegram.
chatbot.step1: Open the Telegram bot link below.
chatbot.step2: Type your question in Khmer or English.
chatbot.step3: Get instant answers about loans, nearby services, and financial tips.
chatbot.sample1: What is the interest rate for ACLEDA loans?
chatbot.sample2: Where is the nearest Wing agent?
chatbot.sample3: What is the difference between a bank and an MFI?

footer.about_text: Rural Finance Hub Cambodia helps rural communities make informed financial decisions through accessible information in Khmer and English.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
